summaryTemplate: {{className}} is the {{patternRole}}. Components report events to the mediator, which decides who else must react, replacing a dense web of direct references. Pattern body lives at {{file}}:{{lineStart}}-{{lineEnd}}.
chosenRationaleTemplate: Tagged as Mediator because {{className}} declares a virtual notify/send coordination method (lines {{lineStart}}-{{lineEnd}}) that components call instead of talking to each other directly.

mediator_notify_method.note: The coordination method. Centralising interaction here is what removes the N-to-N coupling between components.

runnerUpComparisonTemplates.Observer: Observer fans a change out to subscribers that registered themselves. Mediator is a hub components call to coordinate each other — the interaction logic lives in the mediator, not in the senders.
